title: My Favorite Café
content: There is a small café near Olivia’s apartment that she visits almost every weekend. The walls are covered with bookshelves and old photographs. Soft jazz music plays quietly while customers drink coffee and talk softly. Olivia usually orders a cappuccino and a slice of chocolate cake. She likes sitting near the window with her notebook and watching people outside. Sometimes she reads for hours without noticing the time. The employees know her name now and always greet her with a smile. For Olivia, the café feels peaceful and familiar.
